name: Volatile Parasite

topRankStats: Every <LOWER_IS_BETTER>15s spits out a maggot that latches onto the nearest enemy, drawing fire from those within 40m. On death, the maggot bursts, dealing 100% of accumulated damage <DT_VIRAL_COLOR>Viral Damage (+40% damage if the enemy dies while latched) to those within 10m.
levelStats: Every <LOWER_IS_BETTER>30s spits out a maggot that latches onto the nearest enemy, drawing fire from those within 10m. On death, the maggot bursts, dealing 25% of accumulated damage <DT_VIRAL_COLOR>Viral Damage (+40% damage if the enemy dies while latched) to those within 2.5m.
